descriptions: La Barra Del Rojo had major confrontations with La 12.
edges.evidence_quote: it also had major confrontations with the barras bravas of Boca Juniors (La 12), River Plate ( Los Borrachos del Tablón ) and San Lorenzo de Almagro (La Gloriosa), also rivals of the club.

descriptions: Members of Spinelli clan raided a Casamonica villa, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: un gruppo composto da membri del clan Spinelli fa irruzione, scagliandosi contro una lussuosa villa in via Domenico Baccarini abitata da altri Casamonica

'Ndrina Labate.description: The 'Ndrina Labate is a powerful 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta in Reggio Calabria, Italy. It operates in the neighborhoods of Gebbione, Rione Ferrovieri, Sbarre, and Stadio, and is allied with the Tegano clan. The clan has been targeted in several police operations, including 'Archi' (2011), 'Helianthus' (2020), 'Cassa Continua' (2020), and 'Las Vegas' (2020). Its leader, Pietro Labate, was arrested in 2013 and sentenced to 20 years for extortion and mafia association.

descriptions: Tegano and Labate are mentioned together as allied in arrests.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 5 aprile 2011 vengono arrestate, durante l'operazione Archi 21 persone presunte affiliate alle cosche Tegano e Labate , tra cui Giuseppe e Bruno Tegano, fratelli di Giovanni Tegano, ne mancano all'appello 5 tra cui il capo dei Labate : Pietro Labate , uscito dal carcere solo un anno prima .

descriptions: The Labate 'ndrina is allied with the Tegano 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: alleata dei Tegano

Rathkeale Rovers.description: The Rathkeale Rovers are a criminal group based in Ireland but operating internationally, composed of members of Ireland's Travelling Community. They engage in fraud, money laundering, drug smuggling, and art theft, notably stealing rhino horns and Chinese antiquities from museums. The group originated with Simon Quilligan and was later led by the O'Brien family. Europol and US authorities have investigated them, leading to multiple arrests.

descriptions: Alwiya al-Furqan is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Alwiya al-Furqan

descriptions: Ahrar al-Sham jointly participated in attacks with Alwiya al-Furqan.
edges.evidence_quote: Ahrar al-Sham along with other Free Syrian Army-aligned factions including the Jesus Son of Mary Battalions and Alwiya al-Furqan jointly took part in the ISIL-led attacks code named 'Volcano of Rage'

Green Street Counts.description: A street gang based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, active in the early 1950s. Their turf centered at 21st and Green Streets, and they specialized in armed robbery, kidnapping, and weapons dealings. The gang gained notoriety after member Joseph 'Blackie' Battel was sentenced to life for a robbery murder. A separate, unaffiliated group also operated under the same name in West Philadelphia.

descriptions: The Green Street Counts connected with the K&A Gang after release from prison.
edges.evidence_quote: After their release the Counts would later connect with the K&A Gang of Philadelphia's Kensington section.

edges.target: Knights of the Ku Klux Klan
descriptions: Edwards was a member of the Knights of the Ku Klux Klan before founding the IKA.
edges.evidence_quote: In the early 1990s, Ron Edwards was the head of a Kentucky-based klavern (local unit) of the Knights of the Ku Klux Klan . In July 1994, he joined the short-lived Federation of Klans after it broke away from the Knights of the KKK

descriptions: MPCP is the main remaining faction of Shining Path, but distanced itself from its legacy.
edges.evidence_quote: The main remaining faction of the Shining Path, the Militarized Communist Party of Peru ( MPCP ), is active in the VRAEM region of Peru, and it has since distanced itself from the Shining Path's legacy in 2018

descriptions: MPCP is a splinter group of Shining Path.
edges.evidence_quote: The main remaining group, called the Militarized Communist Party of Peru (MPCP) of about 300 individuals remained in the Valle de los Ríos Apurímac, Ene y Mantaro (VRAEM) region, reportedly making revenue by escorting cocaine traffickers and are reportedly led by two brothers; Víctor and Jorge Quispe Palomino.

'Ndrina Ferrazzo.description: The 'Ndrina Ferrazzo is a 'ndrina (criminal family) of the 'Ndrangheta, based in Petilia Policastro and Mesoraca, Crotone, Italy. It is involved in arms and drug trafficking, money laundering in tourism and real estate, and has operations in Sardinia, Lombardy, Abruzzo, Molise, Switzerland, and Spain. The group has alliances with other 'ndrine in the Catanzaro area and has been active since at least the 1960s.

descriptions: The 'Ndrina Ferrazzo is a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Ferrazzo è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese

descriptions: Mario Donato Ferrazzo made agreements with clans from Crotone and Lombardy.
edges.evidence_quote: sarebbero stati realizzati accordi con clan del Crotonese e della Lombardia

descriptions: The 'Ndrina Ferrazzo was in opposition to the clan operating in the Neto Valley.
time_periods: tra gli anni Ottanta e Novanta
edges.evidence_quote: in contrapposizione con la cosca che operava nella Valle del Neto

descriptions: Ferrazzo is listed as an allied 'ndrina in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: 'Ndrine alleate - Ferrazzo (Mesoraca)

descriptions: The text states that Pane-Iazzolino are allies of Ferrazzo.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Grande Aracri e dei Mannolo di Cutro , con i Ferrazzo di Mesoraca e con i Farao-Marincola di Cirò .

descriptions: Lopers 13 and Walnut Street are rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Walnut street, Logan street

descriptions: The Ascione and Birra clans have been in a long faida, with Ascione eventually prevailing.
edges.evidence_quote: seconda faida di Ercolano : faida decennale che vede coinvolti i clan Ascione e Birra

descriptions: The two clans have been in a violent feud for about ten years.
edges.evidence_quote: Da una decina d'anni, la seconda faida di Ercolano vede coinvolti gli Ascione contro i Birra.

descriptions: Ascione and Birra were rival clans engaged in a bloody feud over drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: La spartizione del traffico di stupefacenti ad Ercolano diede avvio ad una sanguinosa faida tra i due clan rivali, ovvero gli Ascione e i Birra.

descriptions: The passage describes multiple violent acts between Ascione and Birra-Iacomino, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan Ascione è un sodalizio camorristico, originario ed operante nella zona di Ercolano.

descriptions: The two clans are in a violent conflict, with multiple murders and retaliations between them.
edges.evidence_quote: Il capoclan, allora, per placare la sua sete di vendetta, pretese di assistere all'esecuzione della missione di morte che aveva ordinato.

descriptions: The text mentions a 'faida' (feud) between the clans, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: ex killer del clan Birra-Iacomino, durante la faida

descriptions: Iengo-Birra is the same as Birra, so the feud is between Ascione and Iengo-Birra.
edges.evidence_quote: La spartizione del traffico di stupefacenti ad Ercolano diede avvio ad una sanguinosa faida tra i due clan rivali, ovvero gli Ascione e i Birra.

descriptions: The murder of Francesco Vitiello by the Iengo-Birra clan marked the start of a conflict between the two clans.
edges.evidence_quote: L'omicidio avvenuto per mano del clan Iengo-Birra, segnava l'inizio di una lotta tra i due clan.

descriptions: Ascione-Papale and Iacomino-Birra are mentioned as a combined group.
edges.evidence_quote: presunte affiliate al clan Ascione-Papale Iacomino-Birra

descriptions: Durantini were allies of Iengo-Birra.
edges.evidence_quote: il clan Iengo-Birra, clan che poteva contare sulla partecipazione di numerosi alleati, tra i quali, la schiera dei Durantini

descriptions: Members of Lo Russo and Birra-Iacomino were arrested for planning an ambush together.
edges.evidence_quote: nove persone, quattro del clan Lo Russo di Miano e cinque dei Birra-Iacomino, vennero arrestate in quanto ritenute coinvolte nella pianificazione e nell'esecuzione dell'imboscata di Mario Ascione

descriptions: Birra-Iacomino allied with Lo Russo to carry out a murder.
edges.evidence_quote: Il compito fu affidato al clan alleato dei "Capitoni", ovvero i Lo Russo, in particolare alla squadra del reggente Raffaele Perfetto.

descriptions: A woman affiliated with Birra participated in the murder of Antonio Papale, brother of the Papale boss.
edges.evidence_quote: omicidio di Antonio Papale ... la vittima era il fratello del boss del clan rivale Mario Papale. La donna avrebbe partecipato ... fornendo la 'battuta' al killer.

descriptions: Members are affiliated with both Ascione-Papale and Iacomino-Birra.
edges.evidence_quote: affiliate agli Ascione-Papale e Iacomino-Birra

descriptions: Birra clan is a rival of Vollaro clan per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Mazzarella clan, Birra clan, Cozzolino clan

descriptions: Cannonball and Overkill were aligned against Undertakers MC during the Nordic Biker War.
edges.evidence_quote: As a Hells Angels support club, Cannonball was aligned with the HA prospect chapter Overkill MC against the Undertakers MC, a prospect club of the Bandidos, during the Nordic Biker War in the 1990s.

descriptions: Overkill MC was a prospect chapter of Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: the HA prospect chapter Overkill MC

descriptions: Overkill MC and Undertakers MC were on opposing sides in the Nordic Biker War.
edges.evidence_quote: As a Hells Angels support club, Cannonball was aligned with the HA prospect chapter Overkill MC against the Undertakers MC, a prospect club of the Bandidos, during the Nordic Biker War in the 1990s.

Os Manos.description: Brazilian criminal organization based in Rio Grande do Sul, founded in 1990 inside the Central Prison of Porto Alegre by Dilonei Melara. It is one of the two largest criminal groups in the state, alongside Bala na Cara, and focuses on drug trafficking, robberies, money laundering, and other violent crimes. The group has expanded to neighboring states and countries such as Uruguay and Paraguay, and is considered the largest criminal organization in Rio Grande do Sul.

descriptions: BNC is listed as a rival of Os Manos in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , V7 , Os Tauras , BNC , Os Aberto , Cebolas , CNG

descriptions: Cebolas is listed as a rival of Os Manos in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , V7 , Os Tauras , BNC , Os Aberto , Cebolas , CNG

descriptions: CNG is listed as a rival of Os Manos in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , V7 , Os Tauras , BNC , Os Aberto , Cebolas , CNG

descriptions: CV is listed as a rival of Os Manos in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , V7 , Os Tauras , BNC , Os Aberto , Cebolas , CNG

descriptions: Os Aberto is listed as a rival of Os Manos in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , V7 , Os Tauras , BNC , Os Aberto , Cebolas , CNG

descriptions: Os Tauras is listed as a rival of Os Manos in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , V7 , Os Tauras , BNC , Os Aberto , Cebolas , CNG

descriptions: Os Manos and PCC have established an alliance since approximately 2017.
edges.evidence_quote: Aproximadamente desde 2017, Os Manos e o PCC têm estabelecido uma aliança

descriptions: V7 is listed as a rival of Os Manos in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , V7 , Os Tauras , BNC , Os Aberto , Cebolas , CNG

descriptions: V7 initially had a non-aggression pact with Os Manos, but later entered into war over unpaid debts.
edges.evidence_quote: Os V7 entraram em guerra contra Os Manos por conta de dividas que não foram pagas, no inicio as duas facções tinham um acordo de 'não se agredir', estando neutra uma a outra, mas por conta das dividas e dos desacertos romperam o acordo.

descriptions: V7 and Os Manos had a non-aggression pact, a cooperative agreement.
edges.evidence_quote: no inicio as duas facções tinham um acordo de 'não se agredir', estando neutra uma a outra

descriptions: The Berman Brothers were rivals to the AZ Syndicate, briefly eclipsing them in the 1940s.
edges.evidence_quote: FBI files reveal that rival Minneapolis Jewish mob boss David Berman contributed very heavily to Marvin L. Kline 's mayoral campaign under the understanding that Berman would receive a monopoly over illegal gambling in Minneapolis. Therefore, during Kline's 1941–1945 term as Mayor, Berman briefly eclipsed the Blumenfelds and became the leader of the Minneapolis criminal underworld.

descriptions: Li Bergolis are allies of the Sinesi-Francavilla battery.
edges.evidence_quote: I clan predominanti sono i Li Bergolis di Monte Sant'Angelo (alleati della batteria foggiana dei Sinesi-Francavilla)

descriptions: Kavač clan maintains close links with remainders of the Šarić clan.
edges.evidence_quote: "Kavač" OCG maintains close links with remainders of the Šarić clan

descriptions: Šarić gang ousted 'Ndrangheta from the drug market, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2010 it was revealed that the Šarić gang had, from 2008 to 2009, ousted the 'Ndrangheta from the drug market.

descriptions: Foxtrot is allied with Bro-network.
edges.evidence_quote: it has been established through numerous investigations that the Foxtrot Network is allied with the Bro-network and Zero Network.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa was hostile to the cartel formed by Fusco-Ponticelli and Sarno.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan De Luca Bossa fu ostile al cartello formato dai clan Fusco-Ponticelli e Sarno.

descriptions: Bandidos patched over Destroyers chapters in Germany.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bandidos expanded into Germany in June 2000 when the club "patched over" seventeen chapters of the Ghostrider's, Road Eagles and Destroyers that had been serving as probationary chapters since the previous year.

Scattered Spider.description: Scattered Spider is a hacking group mostly composed of teens and young adults from the United States and the United Kingdom, believed to be affiliated with the cybercriminal network 'The Com'. Founded around May 2022, the group gained notoriety for hacking and extorting Caesars Entertainment and MGM Resorts International in 2023. They have also targeted numerous other companies including Visa, Marks & Spencer, and Snowflake cloud storage customers. The group uses social engineering, SIM swapping, and multi-factor authentication fatigue attacks.

descriptions: Scattered Spider collaborated with ALPHV for ransomware operations.
edges.evidence_quote: Scattered Spider collaborated with ALPHV , a software development team which provides ransomware as a service.

descriptions: Scattered Spider formed a collective with Lapsus$ and ShinyHunters in 2025.
edges.evidence_quote: A collective of cybercrime groups, including Scattered Spider, Lapsus$ and ShinyHunters was forged in 2025, and has created at least 16 Telegram channels since August 8, 2025.

Molluso 'ndrina.description: The Molluso 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta based in Platì, Calabria, Italy, founded in the 1970s. It is involved in drug trafficking, money laundering, arms trafficking, extortion, corruption, gambling, and murder. The clan has a strong presence in the province of Milan, particularly in Buccinasco and Corsico, and is allied with the Barbaro and Papalia 'ndrine.

descriptions: Molluso 'ndrina is an ally of Barbaro 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Molluso 'ndrina

descriptions: Papalia 'ndrina is allied with Molluso 'ndrina per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Barbaro 'ndrina , Sergi 'ndrina , Trimboli 'ndrina , Molluso 'ndrina , South American drug cartels

descriptions: Molluso is a sub-unit of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: The Molluso 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: Molluso is historically allied to Barbaro.
edges.evidence_quote: The 'ndrina is historically allied to the Barbaro and Papalia 'ndrine

descriptions: Molluso originated as a branch of Barbaro.
edges.evidence_quote: it began as a branch of the powerful Barbaro 'ndrina

descriptions: Molluso is historically allied to Papalia.
edges.evidence_quote: The 'ndrina is historically allied to the Barbaro and Papalia 'ndrine

descriptions: The Molluso family is considered a satellite of the Barbaro-Papalia clan, indicating a subordinate or allied relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: la famiglia Molluso è considerata da sempre «satellite» dei potentissimi Barbaro - Papalia

descriptions: Molluso is allied to Sergi according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Barbaro 'ndrina , Papalia 'ndrina , Sergi 'ndrina , Trimboli 'ndrina , South American drug cartels

descriptions: Molluso is allied to Trimboli according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Barbaro 'ndrina , Papalia 'ndrina , Sergi 'ndrina , Trimboli 'ndrina , South American drug cartels

descriptions: Molluso 'ndrina is listed as an ally of Sergi 'ndrina in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Barbaro 'ndrina, Papalia 'ndrina, Trimboli 'ndrina, Molluso 'ndrina, South American drug cartels

descriptions: Molluso is listed as an ally of Trimboli in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Barbaro 'ndrina, Papalia 'ndrina, Sergi 'ndrina, Molluso 'ndrina, South American drug cartels

descriptions: Little Forty Thieves was an apprentice gang of the original Forty Thieves.
edges.evidence_quote: The juvenile Little Forty Thieves , an apprentice street gang of the original Forty Thieves, would outlast their mentors, continuing to commit illegal activities throughout the 1850s before eventually joining the later street gangs following the American Civil War in 1865.

descriptions: Saskatchewan Warriors adopted the Warriors banner from Manitoba Warriors.
edges.evidence_quote: Other organizations that have adopted the 'Warriors' banner such as the Alberta and Saskatchewan Warriors
